hero.title: Instant images. Every shot sells.
hero.subtitle: Generate hero images, detail pages, and retouched product photos for any marketplace. Upload your product, get studio-quality results.
hero.feature1Desc: Turn raw product shots into conversion-focused ecommerce hero images
hero.feature2Desc: Plan and generate complete product detail visuals from a single workflow
hero.feature3Desc: Refine product textures, lighting, and cleanup tasks in commercial batches

section1.title: Shopix Hero Image Generator
section1.subtitle: Upload your product images and let Shopix generate ecommerce hero images tailored for marketplace conversion.
section1.cap1Desc: Detect materials, color, texture, and selling points before generation starts
section1.cap2Desc: Adapt image direction for Amazon, TikTok Shop, Taobao, Tmall, JD, and more
section1.cap3Desc: Control scene, lighting, composition, tone, and product presentation without manual rework

section2.title: Detail Page Asset Creation
section2.subtitle: Generate a full set of ecommerce product visuals, from selling-point modules to campaign-ready supporting images.
section2.cap1Desc: Organize detail-page sections around product benefits, features, and shopper objections
section2.cap2Desc: Switch between domestic and global commerce layouts without rebuilding every asset
section2.cap3Desc: Run one analysis, then produce multiple creative assets in parallel for launch speed

section3.title: Shopix Product Photo Editing
section3.subtitle: Use Shopix to retouch product photos, clean distractions, enhance materials, and ship marketplace-ready images faster.
section3.cap1Desc: Adjust gloss, fabric, edges, and texture while preserving the real product identity
section3.cap2Desc: Refine up to 50 product images in one pass for catalog and campaign production
section3.cap3Desc: Improve clarity, lighting, and detail for polished ecommerce product photo editing output

defaultPlans.designSpecs: All images must follow a consistent apparel e-commerce visual system, emphasizing material, silhouette, and detail presentation.

front.title: White Background Retouched (Front)
front.description: Show the garment's front silhouette and color details
front.designContent: Use a white-background flatlay or front-facing model shot to clearly present the garment's silhouette, primary color, and workmanship.

back.title: White Background Retouched (Back)
back.description: Show the garment's back silhouette and construction details
back.designContent: Use a clean white-background back view to clearly present the rear cut, structure, and finishing.

front.title: 3D Showcase (Front)
front.description: A front-facing wear shot that highlights volume and silhouette
front.designContent: Use a front-facing model pose to show dimensional volume and silhouette through lighting, while preserving the garment's texture and keeping the background and styling consistent.

back.title: 3D Showcase (Back)
back.description: A back-facing wear shot that shows rear structure and cut
back.designContent: Use a back-facing model pose to clearly show the rear cut, seams, and structure while preserving the fabric texture and keeping the same model, styling, and background.

side.title: 3D Showcase (Side)
side.description: A side profile that reveals side layering and shape
side.designContent: Use a side-facing model pose to show the garment's layering and silhouette from the side while preserving texture and maintaining the same model, styling, and background.

mannequin.title: Mannequin Display Image
mannequin.description: A mannequin or dress-form display that preserves the garment's original look
mannequin.designContent: Display the garment on a mannequin or dress form while strictly preserving its original material, color, cut, texture, and overall appearance. Simulate realistic studio or natural lighting with highlights, shadows, and fabric reflections. This is a display change, not a redesign.

detail.title: Detail Close-up {index}
detail.description: Magnify fabric texture and craftsmanship details
detail.designContent: Focus on the collar, cuff, print, or stitching to ensure strong detail clarity and material texture.

sellingPoint.title: Selling Point Image {index}
sellingPoint.description: Highlight the product's core selling point
sellingPoint.designContent: Compose the shot around the core selling point and strengthen the visual hierarchy and memorability.

fallback.title: Image Plan 1
fallback.description: Edit the title and description for this image plan
fallback.designContent: Complete this image plan based on the product's key traits.

front.title: White Background Retouched (Front)
front.description: Show the garment worn on the reference subject from the front
front.designContent:
Image type: White Background Retouched (Front)
Subject recognition: Keep the reference subject's identity or species consistent and use a stable front-facing pose.
Garment recognition: Fully preserve the garment's front color, material, silhouette, pattern, and key craft details.
Try-on strategy: The garment must be naturally worn by the reference subject with no floating clothes or redesign, while clearly showing the front wear state.
Composition: Pure white background with the subject centered to highlight the garment's front silhouette and fit.
Lighting: Soft studio light that preserves material texture and volume.
Background: Clean pure white background with no distractions.
Color plan: Accurately restore the garment's main and secondary colors, including exact hex values.
Text: No text added (visual only).
Mood keywords: clean, professional, realistic, commercial e-commerce.

back.title: White Background Retouched (Back)
back.description: Show the garment worn on the reference subject from the back
back.designContent:
Image type: White Background Retouched (Back)
Subject recognition: Keep the reference subject's identity or species consistent and use a stable back-facing pose.
Garment recognition: Fully preserve the garment's back color, material, structure, and rear craft details.
Try-on strategy: The garment must be naturally worn by the reference subject with no floating clothes or redesign, while clearly showing the back structure.
Composition: Pure white background with the subject centered to highlight the back silhouette and fit.
Lighting: Soft studio light that clearly reveals the rear contour and material.
Background: Clean pure white background with no distractions.
Color plan: Accurately restore the garment's main and secondary colors, including exact hex values.
Text: No text added (visual only).
Mood keywords: clean, professional, realistic, commercial e-commerce.

threeD.title: 3D Showcase
threeD.description: Highlight the garment's volume, silhouette, and layering on the reference subject
threeD.designContent:
Image type: 3D Showcase
Subject recognition: Keep the reference subject's identity or species consistent and preserve body posture and pose direction.
Garment recognition: Fully preserve the garment's color, material, silhouette, and key details.
Try-on strategy: Emphasize volume, layering, and natural fit while keeping the subject realistic rather than turning it into a 3D mannequin.
Composition: Use a medium close-up or three-quarter-body framing to highlight the garment's silhouette and layering.
Lighting: Directional soft light that enhances dimensionality and wrinkle definition.
Background: A simple commercial backdrop or a clean gradient background.
Color plan: Accurately restore the garment's main and secondary colors, including exact hex values.
Text: No text added (visual only).
Mood keywords: dimensional, layered, textured, commercial.

mannequin.title: Mannequin Shot
mannequin.description: A standardized showcase that preserves the garment's original material and appearance
mannequin.designContent:
Image type: Mannequin Shot
Subject recognition: Keep the reference subject's identity or species consistent and do not replace it with a literal empty mannequin.
Garment recognition: Strictly preserve the garment's original material, color, style, cut, texture, and fabric handfeel.
Try-on strategy: Treat this as a standardized showcase where the subject naturally wears the garment while emphasizing clarity and material realism.
Composition: Use a steady standardized composition that highlights the garment as a whole.
Lighting: Realistic studio or natural lighting with clear highlights, shadows, and fabric reflections.
Background: A clean standard backdrop that does not compete with the garment.
Color plan: Accurately restore the garment's main and secondary colors, including exact hex values.
Text: No text added (visual only).
Mood keywords: standardized, realistic, material-driven, professional.

detail.title: Detail Close-up {index}
detail.description: Magnify the fabric, craft, and fit details where the garment meets the subject
detail.designContent:
Image type: Detail Close-up
Subject recognition: Keep the reference subject's identity or species consistent and focus on a local worn area.
Garment recognition: Highlight key details such as collar, cuff, buttons, fabric texture, or stitching.
Try-on strategy: Show the garment's local fit and true material on the subject without changing the garment structure.
Composition: Use a macro or close-up framing focused on one high-value detail.
Lighting: Side soft light that enhances texture and craftsmanship.
Background: Softened or shallow-depth background.
Color plan: Accurately restore the garment's main and secondary colors, including exact hex values.
Text: No text added (visual only).
Mood keywords: precise, textured, crafted, clear.

sellingPoint.title: Selling Point Image {index}
sellingPoint.description: Compose around the core selling point and make the worn result memorable
sellingPoint.designContent:
Image type: Selling Point Image
Subject recognition: Keep the reference subject's identity or species consistent and build around the worn experience or visual impact.
Garment recognition: Highlight the garment's most important selling point, such as silhouette, function, material, or design feature.
Try-on strategy: Keep the garment naturally worn by the subject and use composition or pose to strengthen the selling point without drifting from the design.
Composition: Combine medium and close-up framing to reinforce the selling-point area and hierarchy.
Lighting: Use accent light or rim light to guide focus.
Background: A concise commercial setting that supports the selling-point story.
Color plan: Accurately restore the garment's main and secondary colors, including exact hex values.
Text: No text added (visual only).
Mood keywords: conversion-focused, concentrated, memorable, commercial.

fallback.title: Try-on Plan 1
fallback.description: A wear presentation plan for the reference subject
fallback.designContent:
Image type: Subject Try-on Showcase
Subject recognition: Keep the reference subject's identity or species consistent.
Garment recognition: Keep the garment's color, material, silhouette, and key details consistent.
Try-on strategy: The garment must be naturally worn by the reference subject.
Composition: Medium-shot commercial composition.
Lighting: Soft commercial lighting.
Background: Clean background.
Color plan: Restore the garment's color values accurately.
Text: No text added (visual only).
Mood keywords: realistic, professional, commercial e-commerce.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.autoRenewA: Yes. It renews automatically based on the selected billing cycle, and you can cancel anytime.
faq.cancelQ: Will it stop immediately after cancellation?
faq.cancelA: No. Your subscription stays active until the current billing period ends.
faq.expiryA: One-time purchase credits never expire. Subscription bonus credits follow platform rules.
